name: Portfolio Manager
bio: Institutional experience in quantitative strategies and options market making. Former senior roles at tier-one investment banks with focus on systematic alpha generation.

name: Risk Manager
bio: Expertise in derivatives risk management and regulatory compliance. Background in institutional risk control and portfolio construction with emphasis on drawdown management.

name: Operations Lead
bio: Operational expertise in fund management and FCA regulatory framework. Experience in institutional operations, compliance, and investor relations.
